cases.prompt: Turn this feature idea into a PRD with goals, requirements, and constraints.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a structured product requirements document.

cases.prompt: Draft a PRD for the new workflow and keep it practical and specific.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates a clear PRD rather than a vague concept note.
This asks for code, not a PRD.

cases.prompt: I only have a rough idea and some constraints; create a PRD that clarifies the scope and success criteria.
cases.expected_behavior: Expands a vague idea into explicit product requirements.
